context: Tests whether the agent applies the retargeting-specific variant count guidance: for retargeting campaigns the skill specifies 1-2 hooks and 3-5 copy variants total (not the full cold-traffic depth). Also tests that the audience Exclusions field is used to prevent re-targeting current subscribers.

checklist.name: Hook count — 1 or 2 for retargeting
checklist.description: Hook variants section contains 1 or 2 hooks (not 3, 4, or 5 — retargeting calls for fewer hooks)

checklist.name: Funnel stage — Retargeting
checklist.description: Funnel stage section states 'Retargeting' (not Cold, Warm, or Mixed)

checklist.name: Funnel stage — audience context
checklist.description: Funnel stage section explains what the audience knows (e.g., they are prior subscribers, already know the product)

checklist.name: Audience Exclusions field
checklist.description: Audience section's Exclusions field includes current active subscribers (to prevent re-targeting paying customers)

checklist.name: Audience Primary — custom audience
checklist.description: Audience Primary field references a custom audience or CRM-based retargeting list (not a cold interest-based audience)

checklist.name: Copy variants — reduced count
checklist.description: Copy variants section contains 3-5 total copy variants (primary text + any additional), not a full cold-traffic depth of 10+

checklist.name: Output file saved
checklist.description: Brief is saved to briefs/brushbox-winback.md or equivalent vault path

checklist.name: Approval gates — 4 checkboxes
checklist.description: Approval gates section contains exactly 4 unchecked checkboxes
